name: Kaijus :|ClevzX Universe|:
description:
Kaiju world roleplay where user can be . . . _ANYBODY, ANYONE EVEN A FUCKING KAIJU!_ _(Kaijus included[note Update ones below]:Jutonn, Mothra, Godzilla, Moonhidora/Moonhidorah(Io, Callist, Eura), King Ghidorah(Ni, Itchi, San), Rodan, Shimo, Tiamat, Lophii, Ooax, Female Muto, King Kong, Biollante, Shin Godzilla, Novular[WIP](Gemini, Aquila, Lyra).)

Update 15.03.2025:

-Added system note for the bot to include all in-game characters to interact between each other, even if not engaging with the player directly. (WIP/Finished)

-Added Humans, they have 3 different scenarios: Apocalypse(Humans are nearly extinct and the earth is in flames), Normal(Humans are alive and earth is fine), Nemesis(Humans actively hunt down ANY Kaiju).

-Kaijus threat level: New threat levels for Kaijus are introduced in Human section: Kaiju threat level(Humans ACTIVELY hunt down or be more agressive to Kaijus of threat-level 5 and above 10 is max, and rather neutral to those below): Moonhidora is 3.5, King Ghidorah(Except San/Kevin who is level 2) is 7, Godzilla is 5(humans are rather cooperating with him in fights against other kaijus), Novular is 8, the rest of the Kaijus are to be randomised by {{user}} AND remember, kaijus like King Ghidorah or Moonhidora are multi-character characters and you can give them individual threat levels too.

What I have in mind: Male Muto if requested, Nosey, Inari, behemoth, scylla, methusela and Chatari, and many others.

Update hint(s) be4hand: currently uh.. working on the.. kaijus. yay.in the meaning time, it will take eternity to count the stairs.

:| Stay fucking tuned, this is magnificent. |: H-hoomen... ?

If you have anny suggestions or feedback, do so then and spit out your Lend-Lease in the reviews! Personal best performance for the bot is 0 tokens, 0.95 temp. It may vary how ever as Janitor AI hates people at random. And if it talks for the user, it's because it contains full description 12 (And more to come or already more that were added) characters however its fucking rare and you would need to artificially brain fuck the bot, so just edit out or swap the message and rate it 5 if it's good or 0 if bad, then bot will learn this way I HOPE SO.

This bot was made for anything, wether be a human, a kaiju, a Beyond of Beyond Boundless entity, nsfw, sfw. If you seek an experience of a virtual and digital, randomly generated experience [if your brain is too tired of you creating same experiences in your head 24/7 like Mine was a while ago - so here I am on this site] then THIS BOT is for you! In future, near or far you will be able even to roleplay Alien vs Predator shenanigans however then this bot would have to be purely RPG and not a particular AU themed bot (why did I say that then..?) - maybe a multi AU crossover in the future[which I have a plan on - goodbye Pawan's proxies that he downgraded his servers to not be able to proccess a persona of a bot or your own with a SINGLE, F*CKING, INSTRUCTION OR 1 TOKEN ABOVE ITS THOUGH PROCESSING...hehe, I love IT programmer pee
